hero.title: Rent a Car in Cluj-Napoca
hero.subtitle: Our modern fleet is ready for you. Clear prices, no surprises.

items.title: Transparent pricing
items.desc: No hidden fees. You pay exactly what you see.

items.title: Well-maintained cars
items.desc: Fleet regularly serviced and checked before every rental.

items.title: Flexible pickup
items.desc: Airport, Cluj city centre, or our office in Baciu.

items.title: Online booking
items.desc: Reserve in minutes, straight from your phone.

steps.title: Choose a car
steps.desc: Filter by type, fuel, or budget and find the right car.

steps.title: Enter your details
steps.desc: Fill in your personal information and pickup/drop-off locations.

steps.title: Confirm and go
steps.desc: Receive email confirmation and we will be waiting at the agreed date.

cta.subtitle: Call us or book directly online.

about.title: About us
about.p1: Covareli is a car rental company based in Baciu, Cluj-Napoca. We offer quality service with a modern, well-maintained fleet.
about.p2: We pride ourselves on transparent pricing, flexible pickup and drop-off, and a personal relationship with every customer.
about.p3: Whether you need a car for a day or longer, we are here to help.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Write to us or give us a call

contact.success: Message sent! We will get back to you shortly.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
